Description: "Remove the logic that restricted users to choosing only one set of parents (either yours or spouse's). Users can now select both sets of parents concurrently under Family Health Optima rules, and the regulatory warning text has been updated."
Instruction: "Remove mutual exclusivity checks in incrementMyParents and incrementSpouseParents, remove conditional disabled classes and locks from parents selector UI cards, and update regulatory text."
toolAction: "Enabling concurrent selection of both sets of parents"
